subject: Advisory: drop bear activity linked to urban expansion in Hobart | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-0989
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of labrador work in Hobart. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-0989. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: drop-bears, delivery.
